problem id: 3b92cc78
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(3)

examples:
  00100001 -> 01001000
  10111100 -> 11101111
  00110011 -> 11011100
  00011110 -> 11110111
  10001010 -> 11110010
  11011011 -> 11111110
  10011001 -> 11101110
  01110010 -> 10011100

query: 00100100
predicted answer: 00101001
